extra_commands: cd /var/www/qrbanner && node -e "const {PrismaClient}=require('@prisma/client');(async()=>{const p=new PrismaClient();const u=await p.user.findUnique({where:{email:'onur@qrbanner.com'},select:{id:true,activeWorkspaceId:true}});const m=await p.workspaceMember.count({where:{userId:u?.id}});console.log('WORKSPACE userId=',u?.id,'activeWs=',u?.activeWorkspaceId,'memberships=',m);await p['$disconnect']();})();"
